title: The Great Lover
writer: Leo Ditrichstein, Fanny Hatton, Frederic Hatton
actors: John St. Polis, Claire Adams, John Davidson
plot: Ethel Warren returns from studying in Europe to make her debut in New York with the opera company in which Jean Paurel, world-famous baritone, is the star. Carlo Sonino, also a member of the company, falls in love with Ethel and w...
